text: Doctor ne phir stress bol kar nikaal diya, par main unhe kaise samjhaun ki 'log kya kahenge' ke darr se main ek fake identity jee rahi hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe. Mummy ab meri shaadi ki baatein kar rahi hain aur mujhse 'achi bahu' banne ki umeed rakhti hain, par main unka dil nahi tod sakti isliye apni reality chhupa kar bas haan mein haan mila deti hoon. Mere liye parivaar ki shanti meri apni pehchaan se bohot badi hai.

Doctor ko lagta hai ye mamuli ghabrahat hai, par ye darr hai ki agar ghar walon ko meri sacchai pata chali toh Papa samaj mein mooh dikhane layak nahi rahenge. Main career aur marriage pressure ke beech phasa hoon aur chupchap sab bardaasht kar raha hoon taaki khandaan ki shaan par koi aanch na aaye. Apne partner ke baare mein batane ki himmat nahi hai kyunki main nahi chahta ki meri wajah se ghar mein kalesh ho.

Doctor ne phir symptoms dismiss kar diye, par unhe nahi pata ki ek sanskari beti ka natak karte-karte main andar se mar chuki hoon. Sasural wale career chhudwa kar ghar sambhalne ki baatein kar rahe hain aur main sirf Mummy-Papa ki parvarish par sawal na uthe, isliye chup-chap sacrifice kar rahi hoon. Main apni suppressed identity kisi ko nahi dikhati kyunki hamare khandaan mein izzat hi sab kuch hai.

Doctor ne palpitations ko stress kaha, par ye woh ghutan hai jo mujhe roz apne partner se door reh kar aur ghar walon ke samne jhoot bol kar hoti hai. Agar maine apne liye stand liya toh log kahenge ki beti haath se nikal gayi hai, aur main maa-baap ka sar neechu nahi kar sakti. Sabka maan rakhne ke liye main ek ideal bahu banne ki taiyari kar rahi hoon, chahe meri apni soul khatam ho jaye.

Doctor ne relax karne ko bola, par main unhe kaise bataun ki mera asli 'stress' mera suppressed self hai jo rishta tootne ke darr se bahar nahi aa raha. Main shaadi ke liye haan bol chuka hoon kyunki mard ho kar rona ya kamzori dikhana hamare samaj mein mana hai, aur parivaar ki 'izzat' bachana mera farz hai. Unki khushi ke liye main apni poori zindagi ek jhoot mein bita dunga, taaki khandaan ka naam hamesha uncha rahe.
